prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第65名，近年排名在59–72名之间波动，属于中上水平211高校，理工科实 力突出；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及拟录取研究生不当言论被取消资格事件，对报考心理有轻微降温影响；抖音热度为较热（总排名第57），短视频曝 光量中等偏上，反映一定关注度；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有5个A-及以上学科：环境科学与工程A、光学工程A-、土木工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程 A-，工科基础扎实，与招生专业（计算机、信息安全、数学类、生物技术、建筑学等）高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续 高热推荐，与北工大优势方向匹配，吸引考生报考；内蒙古2026年高考总人数约15.4万，较2025年（约11.6万）增长约32%，物理类考生估算约11万人，竞争显著加剧；北工大位于北京市，属直辖市高校，对内蒙古考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生规模较小 （10余人），属跨省招生，本地无特殊倾斜。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Inner Mongolia Science (Physics Category) were approximately 10504 → 7894 → 10600 → 13739 → 6532, showing significant fluctuations. In 2025, the Physics Category ranking moved sharply forward to 6532, an increase of about 7200 places compared to the 2024 Science ranking, mainly due to the new college entrance examination subject selection model and major group division. The ranking fluctuation range over the past 5 years is approximately between 6500 and 14000, with the 2025 baseline ranking at 6532. The university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia Science (Physics Category): 16 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 16, an expansion of about 45.5% compared to 2025, a significant increase that has an important impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 65th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 59 and 72, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, with outstanding strength in science and engineering. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving an incident where a proposed graduate student made inappropriate remarks leading to disqualification, which has a slight cooling effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 57), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting a certain degree of attention. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. It has 5 A- or above disciplines: Environmental Science and Engineering A, Optical Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with a solid engineering foundation highly relevant to its enrollment majors (Computer Science, Information Security, Mathematics, Biotechnology, Architecture, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, matching the advantageous directions of Beijing University of Technology and attracting candidates. The total number of Inner Mongolia college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 154,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 110,000, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, a municipality directly under the central government, which has a strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is small (over 10 people), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no special local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the significant ranking advancement in 2025, the supply increase of about 45.5% from the 2026 expansion, the intensified competition due to the 32% increase in Inner Mongolia candidates, the pull of persistently high popularity in engineering majors, and the slight cooling effect of the negative reputation, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will move backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025, but the expansion amplitude partially offsets the competitive pressure. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8364, with a fluctuation range of 7864–8864.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Experimental Class)
- Information Security (Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Biotechnology (Experimental Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Digital Intelligence Future Class) (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Energy and Power Engineering (New in 2026)
- Architecture
- Materials Science and Engineering (Green New Quality Class) (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 8364, fluctuation range 7864–8864. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (7864) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, and other popular experimental class majors. Candidates with rankings in the middle range (approximately 8364) are advised to target Tier 2 majors such as Mathematics, Biotechnology, and Artificial Intelligence as the main direction. Candidates with rankings near or above the upper limit (8864) are advised to use Tier 3 majors such as Energy and Power Engineering, Architecture, and Materials Science and Engineering as safety options. Beijing University of Technology has added new majors in 2026, including Artificial Intelligence (Digital Intelligence Future Class), Energy and Power Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering (Green New Quality Class), which can be given special attention when applying.
